title: 其實歐盟班友係要認識六國論

replies.msg:
唔知有無巴絲真係翻譯到，仲傳到出去
就算點醒唔到，都可以喺最壞情況吓，鞭9班奶共友屍

以下部分 亂譯

The Six Countries perished not because of shitty weapons or stupid military tactics but their idiotic choice to bribe Qin with their own land. Bribery weakened them and destroyed them. "Hello, Six Countries disappeared one by one all because of bribing Qin, huh?" "Well, countries that did not bribe Qin also perished because they have lost powerful allies and could not stand on their own feet, so I say the choice is idiotic okay?" Except conquering lands after victory from battles, Qin gained a lot from being bribed, small to say tiny villages, more to say key cities. Actually Qin gained hundred times more lands from bribery than war. It's obvious that what Qin wanted most, and what Six Countries worried most, were never in the battlefield. Poor ancestors fighting so hard for a tiny bit of land and their fellow grandsons did not give a shit, giving them out as present like they are some sort of shitty grasses. Today I give out 5, tomorrow I give out 10, for God's sake I can have one good night to sleep, damn it. Tomorrow I wake up, Qin soldiers are here again, dang. Lands are scarce, but Qin's agression is infinite. Who gave him more lands, he fucked that loser harder. So why do we need war? The consequence is doomed. When you perish, the reason has always been there, idiot. Someone said, 'feeding Qin with your lands is like putting up a fire with woods. Well, it makes sense.

後面好長，留待有興趣嘅巴絲接力
